sections_cited: Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.471 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection No.11 2. For order on CMA No. 3765/2024 3. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026 Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, Advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel the questions for determination have already been addressed conclusively by the Hon’ble Supreme Court judgment of Millat Tractors reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view whereof, he seeks that this reference application is not pressed and may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Sindh Revenue Board, as required per Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
